text:
#### 5. Payment Processing System (PPS)  
**System ID:** PPS-001
**Purpose:** Process customer payments and inter-bank settlements
**Technology:** Java microservices, message queue (RabbitMQ)
**Deployment:** Cloud (AWS)
**Processing: 24/7 real-time + batch overnight (BACS)  
**Key Functions:**
- Transfer initiation and validation
- Standing order processing
- Direct debit processing
- Settlement to other banks
- Reconciliation and reporting  
**Payment Methods Supported:**
- Faster Payments Service (FPS) — Real-time, up to £1M
- BACS — Overnight, high volume
- CHAPS — High-value, real-time
- Internal transfers (same bank)  
**Batch Processing Schedule:**
- FPS: Real-time (immediate)
- BACS Submission: 20:00 GMT daily
- CHAPS: Real-time (during hours)  
**Performance:**
- FPS processing: <15 minutes
- BACS processing: Next business day
- Success rate: 99.95%
- Failed transactions: <5 per day  
**Integration:**
- Account Management System (AMS) — account validation
- Fraud Detection Engine (FDE) — fraud check
- Bank of England Settlement Systems (external)
- Treasury System — reconciliation  
---
name: Chunk 8/39

raw_entities.name: Payment Processing System
raw_entities.description: Core banking system responsible for processing customer payments and inter-bank settlements. Operates on Java microservices with a RabbitMQ message queue, deployed on AWS cloud infrastructure. Handles both real-time and overnight batch processing across multiple payment schemes.
context: Process customer payments and inter-bank settlements

raw_entities.name: Account Management System
raw_entities.description: Integrated system used by the PPS to perform account validation for payment processing and transfers before execution.

raw_entities.name: Fraud Detection Engine
raw_entities.description: Security system integrated with the PPS to perform fraud checks on transactions prior to processing and settlement.

raw_entities.name: Bank of England Settlement Systems
raw_entities.description: External settlement infrastructure integrated with the PPS to finalize inter-bank settlements and ensure regulatory compliance.

raw_entities.name: Treasury System
raw_entities.description: Internal system integrated with the PPS to handle reconciliation of payment transactions and manage treasury reporting.

raw_entities.name: Bank of England
raw_entities.description: External regulatory and settlement authority whose infrastructure is integrated with the PPS for inter-bank settlement finalization.

raw_entities.name: Standing Order
raw_entities.description: Payment instruction processed by the PPS that enables customers to schedule recurring transfers to a specified account.

raw_entities.name: Direct Debit
raw_entities.description: Payment method processed by the PPS allowing authorized third parties to collect variable or fixed amounts from a customer's account.

raw_entities.name: Faster Payments Service
raw_entities.description: Real-time payment scheme supported by the PPS, enabling immediate transfers with a maximum limit of £1 million per transaction.
context: Faster Payments Service (FPS) — Real-time, up to £1M

raw_entities.name: Bankers Automated Clearing Services
raw_entities.description: High-volume, overnight payment scheme processed by the PPS for bulk transfers and direct debits.

raw_entities.name: Clearing House Automated Payment System
raw_entities.description: High-value, real-time payment scheme processed by the PPS during operating hours for same-day settlement.

raw_entities.name: Internal Transfer
raw_entities.description: Payment method enabling customers to move funds between accounts within the same bank, processed through the PPS.

raw_entities.name: FPS Processing Time SLA
raw_entities.description: Performance target requiring Faster Payments Service transactions to be processed in under 15 minutes.

raw_entities.name: BACS Processing Time SLA
raw_entities.description: Performance target requiring BACS transactions to be completed by the next business day.

raw_entities.name: Payment Success Rate
raw_entities.description: Operational KPI targeting a 99.95% success rate for all payment transactions processed by the system.

raw_entities.name: Daily Failed Transaction Limit
raw_entities.description: Operational limit capping failed transactions to fewer than 5 per day across all payment schemes.

raw_entities.name: FPS Transaction Value Limit
raw_entities.description: Hard constraint limiting Faster Payments Service transactions to a maximum value of £1 million per transaction.
context: Faster Payments Service (FPS) — Real-time, up to £1M

raw_entities.name: BACS Daily Submission Deadline
raw_entities.description: Operational rule mandating that all BACS batch submissions must be completed by 20:00 GMT daily.

raw_entities.name: CHAPS Real-Time Processing Window
raw_entities.description: Governance rule restricting CHAPS real-time processing to bank operating hours only.

properties.purpose: Process customer payments and inter-bank settlements

properties.definition: Real-time payment service with a £1M limit
Transfers between accounts within the same bank

properties.what_it_measures: Time to process Faster Payments Service transactions
Maximum allowable failed transactions per day
properties.context: Quality control threshold for payment processing

properties.rule_statement: FPS transactions are capped at a maximum value of £1M
BACS batch submissions must be completed by 20:00 GMT each day
CHAPS transactions are processed in real-time only during designated operating hours

relationships.description: PPS executes and manages standing order payment instructions
PPS executes and manages direct debit payment instructions
PPS supports real-time FPS transactions up to £1M
relationships.context: Faster Payments Service (FPS) — Real-time, up to £1M

relationships.description: PPS handles high-volume overnight BACS processing
PPS handles high-value real-time CHAPS transactions
PPS processes internal transfers within the same bank
PPS calls AMS to validate account details before processing
PPS triggers FDE to perform real-time fraud checks on transactions
PPS interfaces with external BoE systems for inter-bank settlement finality
PPS feeds reconciliation data to the Treasury System for daily accounting
PPS tracks FPS processing latency against the <15 minute SLA target
PPS tracks BACS batch processing latency against the next business day SLA target
PPS monitors overall transaction success rate against the 99.95% SLA target
PPS tracks daily failed transaction counts against the <5 per day limit
PPS enforces the £1M per transaction value cap for FPS payments
relationships.context: Faster Payments Service (FPS) — Real-time, up to £1M

relationships.description: PPS enforces the 20:00 GMT daily cutoff for BACS batch submissions
PPS enforces real-time processing constraints during designated CHAPS operating hours
